notes: Mining-challenge study over the AIDev dataset of ~933k agentic GitHub PRs, filtered to 387 build-related PRs / 945 build files. Runs the Sniffer static analyzer to measure code smells before/after AI changes (RQ1), plus manual/qualitative labeling with Fleiss' Kappa inter-rater agreement to categorize smell-eliminating refactorings (RQ2) and analyze PR acceptance/merge behavior (RQ3). Analyzes human review comments only as observational artifacts, not collected participant data, so human_subjects=false. Ships a labeled-PR replication dataset.
